summary: Iteration 43 - Bug fix verification: Authorization header for multipart/form-data requests in restaurant settings. The fix in Settings.js (adding token from localStorage.getItem('token') to upload requests) is working correctly. All tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/restaurant - returns current settings - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/settings/restaurant - update restaurant name - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo with Authorization header - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/restaurant-logo without Authorization - correctly returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: Full flow (upload logo + update settings) - PASSED
Frontend: Navigate to Settings > المطعم tab - PASSED
Frontend: Edit restaurant name (Arabic and English) - PASSED
Frontend: Save settings with success toast - PASSED

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: عند تعديل اسم المطعم والشعار كعميل (demo)، يظهر خطأ 'غير مصرح'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: axios لا يرسل Authorization header مع multipart/form-data تلقائياً
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Added token from localStorage.getItem('token') to Authorization header for logo upload requests
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All API calls return 200 with proper Authorization header

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly adds Authorization header to multipart/form-data requests
Token is properly retrieved from localStorage before upload
Both logo upload and settings update APIs work correctly with the fix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified the bug fix for Authorization header in multipart/form-data requests. The fix in Settings.js (lines 1535-1540) correctly adds the token from localStorage to the Authorization header when uploading restaurant logos. All backend APIs (/api/settings/restaurant GET/PUT, /api/upload/restaurant-logo POST) are working correctly. The demo client (demo@maestroegp.com) can successfully edit restaurant name and upload logo without 'غير مصرح' error.
